title: Rotation Rate of a Diver Before Tucking
body: A diver off the high board imparts an initial rotation with their body fully extended before going into a tuck and executing three back somersaults before hitting the water. Their moment of inertia before the tuck is $$16.9$$ $$kg m^2$$ and after the tuck during the somersaults is $$4.2$$ $$kg m^2$$. They take $$1.4$$ s to execute the somersaults before hitting the water.
